brief: A yoga and wellness retreat center offering multi-day residential programs in a quiet rural setting. The audience is adults seeking rest and reset, browsing programs and dates. Pages should cover the retreat and its ethos, the programs/retreats on offer, the space and accommodation, the teachers, and booking/visit details. Lean into a calm, airy aesthetic: soft neutral palette, very generous spacing, a light elegant serif, and a slow, uncluttered editorial rhythm.
summary: Built Fallow, a six-page calm-editorial site for a rural Welsh yoga & wellness retreat — shared serif/sans design system, soft neutral palette, generous spacing, with home, ethos, programs, space, teachers and visit pages.
